event: Georgian feast scene — figures seated at a table
description: A naive-style painting showing five figures seated at a long table covered with a white cloth in an outdoor setting. The figures wear white headdresses and simple garments, rendered in a flat, primitivist style with bold outlines and minimal modeling. The background shows green trees and a dark green-brown landscape. Small objects (possibly food or dishes) are placed on the table. The painting has the characteristic flat perspective, simplified forms, and earthy palette of Niko Pirosmani's Georgian folk art style. The figures have large, expressive eyes and solemn expressions.
